title: The Great Controversy
description:
This is the second edition of “The Great Controversy Between Christ and Satan”, revised and corrected from the first edition. It faithfully follows the original English publication.

The book presents the great conflict between good and evil from the destruction of Jerusalem through the Reformation and into the final events of earth’s history. It strengthens faith and prepares believers for Christ’s return.
author: Ellen G. White

title: The Acts of the Apostles
description:
The Acts of the Apostles” is the fourth volume in the sacred history series. It tells the inspiring story of the early Christian believers after Christ’s victory over Satan and His ascension to heaven.

The book describes intense persecution, unwavering faith, and the missionary journeys of Peter, Paul, John, James, Luke, Barnabas, Stephen, Mark, and other early disciples who carried the gospel throughout the known world.

Though many sacrificed their lives for their faith, the story continues today as Christ’s church advances under the same divine promises and spiritual power.
author: Ellen G. White

title: The One Desired in All Ages
description:
In every human heart, regardless of background or social status, there is a deep longing for something greater than what is currently possessed.

This desire was placed in humanity by a merciful God so that people would not be satisfied with temporary achievements. God invites every person to seek what is eternal — truth, salvation, and everlasting life.
author: Ellen G. White
